summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact reports no security-sensitive refs and no shared canonical; all listed PRs are treated as independent inventory items with no close, merge, or fix action planned. Five job-listed refs were not present as hydrated preflight items in the compacted artifact, so they are classified non-mutating with null target_updated_at.
